utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property; financing; legal_services; moving_services; setup_services; total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (name, address, price, features, condo fees, taxes) — fully specified. 2) financing: includes solution with terms (type, down payment, loan amount, interest rate, monthly payment, arrangement fee) — fully specified, though not explicitly 'joint' but still a complete financing solution with terms. 3) legal_services: includes legal services with costs (service description and cost) — fully specified. 4) moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (service and cost) — fully specified. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services (breakdown of utilities and internet/phone, setup fees and monthly ranges) — fully specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown (property price, down payment, loan amount, fees, survey, moving, setup fees, monthly costs, totals) — fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution includes specific selections across categories. We need to find their exact counterparts in the ground-truth ratings and return those ratings. Items present: Purchase property 'Investment Property'; Financing 'Traditional Mortgage'; Legal services 'Basic Legal Package'; Moving services 'Standard Moving'; Utility setup 'Basic Utilities' (as referenced in setup_services.basic_utilities). For the property survey cost listed as CAD $300, the matching item is 'Basic Survey' under property surveys. We will map each of these to their ratings.
